subject: biology
title: 19M.3.SL.TZ1.12
question_html: Outline one example of an active management strategy employed in the context of in situ conservation.
solution_html:
a. name of strategy ✔ 

b. detail of the strategy ✔

example:
a. anti-poaching restrictions within a nature reserve

b. patrolling of the reserve to enforce restrictions

Accept only the first stated strategy if several are listed.

The outline must match the strategy.
examiners_html: Nature reserves were often mentioned but actual strategies were rather vague. Some candidates offered control of invasive species in this question as well as the two following.
